Adrenaline.name: KEYWORD_ADRENALINE_NAME
Adrenaline.tooltip_resolved:
Keeps Exhaustion at 0.
+25% Crit Chance.
+25% Block Chance.

AlphaCat.name: KEYWORD_ALPHA_NAME
AlphaCat.tooltip_resolved: This is the Alpha. Certain abilities care about this.

BackflipWhenTargeted.name: KEYWORD_BACKFLIP_NAME
BackflipWhenTargeted.tooltip_resolved: Backflips out of the way the next time it's targeted.

BlessingOfPeace.name: KEYWORD_BLESSINGOFPEACE_NAME
BlessingOfPeace.tooltip_resolved: Gain +{stacks} [img:divineshield] at the end of your turn. Lose this when you deal damage.

BodyGuard.name: KEYWORD_BODYGUARD_NAME
BodyGuard.tooltip_resolved: The next time an ally is targeted, swap places with them first.

ChampionUpgradeNextMinion.name: KEYWORD_PROMOTE_NAME
ChampionUpgradeNextMinion.tooltip_resolved: The next familiar you spawn is upgraded into a [img:champion] Champion.

EliteUpgradeNextMinion.name: KEYWORD_PROMOTE2_NAME
EliteUpgradeNextMinion.tooltip_resolved: The next familiar you spawn is upgraded into an [img:elite] Elite.

Cleave.name: KEYWORD_CLEAVE_NAME
Cleave.tooltip_resolved: Cuts a chunk of meat off what it hits.

ProbeCharmed.name: KEYWORD_PROBED_NAME
ProbeCharmed.tooltip_resolved: It's being controlled! Attack it to break the probe!

DivineShield.name: KEYWORD_DIVINESHIELD_NAME
DivineShield.tooltip_resolved: Blocks an entire instance of incoming damage.

Doomed.name: KEYWORD_DOOMED_NAME
Doomed.tooltip_resolved: Ticks down at the end of your turn. When it hits 0, Die.

DoubleCast.name: KEYWORD_DOUBLECAST_NAME
DoubleCast.tooltip_resolved: The next ability you use is used an additional time for free.

DoubleCastSpell.name: KEYWORD_DOUBLECASTSPELL_NAME
DoubleCastSpell.tooltip_resolved: The next spell you cast is cast an additional time for free.

DoubleCastSpellThisTurn.name: KEYWORD_DOUBLECASTTHISTURN_NAME
DoubleCastSpellThisTurn.tooltip_resolved: The next spell you cast this turn is cast an additional time for free.

/*DoubleLoot.name: Double Loot
/*DoubleLoot.tooltip: The next pickup you collect does double its effects

Drowsy.name: KEYWORD_DROWSY_NAME
Drowsy.tooltip_resolved: Falls asleep at the end of its turn.

DybbukPossessed.name: KEYWORD_DYBBUKED_NAME
DybbukPossessed.tooltip_resolved: This cat is possessed by Dybbuk. Down this cat to exorcise him.

EmptyMind.name: KEYWORD_EMPTYMIND_NAME
EmptyMind.tooltip_resolved: Spells are disabled. Whenever it gets a kill, it takes an extra turn.

Fear.name: KEYWORD_FEAR_NAME
Fear.tooltip_resolved: Moves as far away from enemies as it can at the start of its turn.

FreeSpell.name: KEYWORD_FREESPELL_NAME
FreeSpell.tooltip_resolved: The next spell you cast costs 0 mana.

Freeze.name: KEYWORD_FREEZE_NAME
Freeze.tooltip_resolved: Cannot take damage. Unfreezes at the start of its turn.

Grappled.name: KEYWORD_GRAPPLED_NAME
Grappled.tooltip_resolved: Immobile as long as it's next to the thing that grappled it.

HeatWave.name: KEYWORD_DEHYDRATED_NAME
HeatWave.tooltip_resolved: Heals are reduced by 1. Does not heal after battle. Can be mitigated with water.

Infested.name: KEYWORD_INFESTED_NAME
Infested.tooltip_resolved: The things infesting this pop out when it dies, destroying its corpse.

Leech.name: KEYWORD_LIFESTEAL_NAME
Leech.tooltip_resolved: Heals you equal to the amount of health damage dealt.

Madness.name: KEYWORD_MADNESS_NAME
Madness.tooltip_resolved: Thinks everything is an enemy. Uncontrollable.

MagicWeakness.name: KEYWORD_MAGICWEAKNESS_NAME
MagicWeakness.tooltip_resolved: Incoming magic damage has 100% Crit Chance and can't miss.

Marked.name: KEYWORD_MARKED_NAME
Marked.tooltip_resolved: Incoming physical damage has 100% Crit Chance, ignores shield, and can't miss.

Meaty.name: KEYWORD_MEATY_NAME
Meaty.tooltip_resolved: Turns into meat when it dies.

NextTurnDoubleRangedDamage.name: KEYWORD_DOUBLERANGEDDMG_NAME
NextTurnDoubleRangedDamage.tooltip_resolved: All ranged physical attacks and abilities deal double damage.

NoHealthRegen.name: KEYWORD_NOHEALTHREGEN_NAME
NoHealthRegen.tooltip_resolved: Health won't regen automatically and does not regen at the end of battle.

Ostracized.name: KEYWORD_OSTRACIZED_NAME
Ostracized.tooltip_resolved: Every unit sees this as an enemy and will attack it with priority.

CapturedFamiliarIcon.name: KEYWORD_CAPTUREDFAMILIAR_NAME
CapturedFamiliarIcon.tooltip_resolved: Was once an enemy, is now on your team. Will follow you to future battles if it doesn't die.

RandomInjury.name: KEYWORD_RANDOMINJURY_NAME
RandomInjury.tooltip_resolved: Gain a random injury that lowers one of your stats by 1, permanently.

HealRandomInjury.name: KEYWORD_HEALRANDOMINJURY_NAME
HealRandomInjury.tooltip_resolved: Cure a random injury that was permanently lowering one of your stats, if you have any.

RandomMagicMissile.name: KEYWORD_SPARKLE_NAME
RandomMagicMissile.tooltip_resolved: A projectile that deals 1 magic damage to a random enemy.

TemporaryItem.name: KEYWORD_TEMPITEM_NAME
TemporaryItem.tooltip_resolved: Is lost at the end of the battle.

Robot.name: KEYWORD_ENERGIZED_NAME
Robot.tooltip_resolved: Takes an extra turn. Cannot be Energized again until after that turn ends.

Rot.name: KEYWORD_ROT_NAME
Rot.tooltip_resolved: Hatches a Fly at the end of its turn. Damage from worms and bugs always crits against this.

SafeDoomed.name: KEYWORD_SAFEDOOMED_NAME
SafeDoomed.tooltip_resolved: Ticks down at the end of your turn. When it hits 0, Die (without being injured).

ShortCircuit.name: KEYWORD_SHORTCIRCUIT_NAME
ShortCircuit.tooltip_resolved: All actions are disabled. Cast Break Circuit to break.

SoulLink.name: KEYWORD_SOULLINK_NAME
SoulLink.tooltip_resolved: Whenever a soul linked character loses health, all soul linked characters lose that health as well.

SpiderInfested.name: KEYWORD_SPIDERINFESTED_NAME
SpiderInfested.tooltip_resolved: The spiders infesting this pop out when it dies, destroying its corpse.

Stealth.name: KEYWORD_STEALTH_NAME
Stealth.tooltip_resolved: 50% Dodge Chance. Lose Stealth when you get hit.

StealthUntilBasicAttack.name: KEYWORD_STEALTHUNTIL_NAME
StealthUntilBasicAttack.tooltip_resolved: 50% Dodge Chance. Lose Stealth when you get hit or use your basic attack.

Tech.name: KEYWORD_TECH_NAME
Tech.tooltip_resolved:
Increases the quality of the next item you craft or the next familiar you spawn.
Up to 3 Tech can be used at a time.

TempCounterAttack.name: KEYWORD_TEMPCOUNTER_NAME
TempCounterAttack.tooltip_resolved: Attack things that damage you automatically.

TempInitiativeChange.name: KEYWORD_TEMPINIT_NAME
TempInitiativeChange.tooltip_resolved: You take your turn earlier in the round.

TempPreEmptiveCounterAttack.name: KEYWORD_PRECOUNTER_NAME
TempPreEmptiveCounterAttack.tooltip_resolved: Attack things that target you before they attack you, automatically.

TowerDefenseStatus.name: KEYWORD_SENTRY_NAME
TowerDefenseStatus.tooltip_resolved: The next time an enemy ends its movement in your basic attack range, attack it.

Webbed.name: KEYWORD_WEBBED_NAME
Webbed.tooltip_resolved: Immobile. Use basic attack to break free.

Tangled.name: KEYWORD_TANGLED_NAME
Tangled.tooltip_resolved: Immobile. Use basic attack to break free.

Zombie.name: KEYWORD_ZOMBIE_NAME
Zombie.tooltip_resolved: -2 [img:str]. -2 [img:int]. Takes damage from Holy Element heals. Does not get injured when downed.

Fragile.name: KEYWORD_FRAGILE_NAME
Fragile.tooltip_resolved: This item breaks when you're downed.

Brittle.name: KEYWORD_BRITTLE_NAME
Brittle.tooltip_resolved: This item has a 25% chance to break when you take damage.

Flammable.name: KEYWORD_FLAMMABLE_NAME
Flammable.tooltip_resolved: This item burns up when hit with fire.

Cursed.name: KEYWORD_CURSED_NAME
Cursed.tooltip_resolved: This item cannot be unequipped once equipped.

Reload.name: KEYWORD_RELOAD_NAME
Reload.tooltip_resolved: This action starts disabled and does not refresh on its own after use. Meet the condition to refresh it.

ReloadB.name: KEYWORD_RELOAD_NAME
ReloadB.tooltip_resolved: This action does not refresh on its own after use. Meet the condition to refresh it.

Flying.name: KEYWORD_FLYING_NAME
Flying.tooltip_resolved: Ignores tiles and can pass over units and objects.

Comfort.name: KEYWORD_COMFORT_NAME
Comfort.tooltip_resolved: Affects how often cats will breed or fight.

Stimulation.name: KEYWORD_STIMULATION_NAME
Stimulation.tooltip_resolved: Affects the quality of newborn kittens.

Appeal.name: KEYWORD_APPEAL_NAME
Appeal.tooltip_resolved: Affects the quality of the stray cats that show up each day

Evolution.name: KEYWORD_EVOLUTION_NAME
Evolution.tooltip_resolved: Adds a chance for cats to receive random mutations each night.

Health.name: KEYWORD_HEALTH_NAME
Health.tooltip_resolved: Affects lifespan and chance to develop or cure disorders each night

DemonicGlyph_Bite.name: KEYWORD_TOR_BITE_NAME
DemonicGlyph_Bite.tooltip_resolved: Imbues its owner with an extra turn and the power to Bite

DemonicGlyph_Fire.name: KEYWORD_TOR_FIRE_NAME
DemonicGlyph_Fire.tooltip_resolved: Imbues its owner's basic attack with +2 Damage and +2 Burn.

DemonicGlyph_Summon.name: KEYWORD_TOR_SUMMON_NAME
DemonicGlyph_Summon.tooltip_resolved: Imbues its owner with an extra turn and the power to Summon

DemonicGlyph_Movement.name: KEYWORD_TOR_MOVE_NAME
DemonicGlyph_Movement.tooltip_resolved: Imbues its owner with +1 Movement Range and +3 Trample Damage

DemonicGlyph_Bounce.name: KEYWORD_TOR_BOUNCE_NAME
DemonicGlyph_Bounce.tooltip_resolved: Imbues its owner with the ability to repel attackers.

FinalBossHitCountdownHoly.name: KEYWORD_CHILDHOLY_NAME
FinalBossHitCountdownHoly.tooltip_resolved: Counts down every time it gets hit. At 0, unleash the holy beams.

FinalBossHitCountdownBoris.name: KEYWORD_CHILDPULSE_NAME
FinalBossHitCountdownBoris.tooltip_resolved: Counts down every time it gets hit. At 0, releases a pulse.

FinalBossHitCountdownExplosive.name: KEYWORD_CHILDWRATH_NAME
FinalBossHitCountdownExplosive.tooltip_resolved: Counts down every time it gets hit. At 0, unleash a wrath of holy light.

TVBotObey.name: ENEMY_TVBOT_OBEY_NAME
TVBotObey.tooltip_resolved: Basic attacks of its enemies are disabled.

TVBotStop.name: ENEMY_TVBOT_STOP_NAME
TVBotStop.tooltip_resolved: Basic movement of its enemies is disabled.

TVBotDumb.name: ENEMY_TVBOT_DUMB_NAME
TVBotDumb.tooltip_resolved: Spells of its enemies are disabled.

TVBotDie.name: ENEMY_TVBOT_DIE_NAME
TVBotDie.tooltip_resolved: It is too late. Win now or die.

EliteBuff_Shielded1.name: KEYWORD_ELITE_SHIELDED1_NAME
EliteBuff_Shielded1.tooltip_resolved: At the start of each round, if it has less than 3 [img:shield], set [img:shield] to 3. -20% max health.

EliteBuff_BossShielded1.name: KEYWORD_ELITE_BOSSSHIELDED1_NAME
EliteBuff_BossShielded1.tooltip_resolved: At the start of each round, if it has less than 4 [img:shield], set [img:shield] to 4. -20% max health.

EliteBuff_Shielded2.name: KEYWORD_ELITE_SHIELDED2_NAME
EliteBuff_Shielded2.tooltip_resolved: At the start of each round, if it has less than 5 [img:shield], set [img:shield] to 5. -20% max health.

EliteBuff_BossShielded2.name: KEYWORD_ELITE_BOSSSHIELDED2_NAME
EliteBuff_BossShielded2.tooltip_resolved: At the start of each round, if it has less than 8 [img:shield], set [img:shield] to 8. -20% max health.

EliteBuff_Shielded3.name: KEYWORD_ELITE_SHIELDED3_NAME
EliteBuff_Shielded3.tooltip_resolved: At the start of each round, if it has less than 7 [img:shield], set [img:shield] to 7. -20% max health.

EliteBuff_BossShielded3.name: KEYWORD_ELITE_BOSSSHIELDED3_NAME
EliteBuff_BossShielded3.tooltip_resolved: At the start of each round, if it has less than 12 [img:shield], set [img:shield] to 12. -20% max health.

EliteBuff_Shielded4.name: KEYWORD_ELITE_SHIELDED4_NAME
EliteBuff_Shielded4.tooltip_resolved: At the start of each round, if it has less than 9 [img:shield], set [img:shield] to 9. -20% max health.

EliteBuff_BossShielded4.name: KEYWORD_ELITE_BOSSSHIELDED4_NAME
EliteBuff_BossShielded4.tooltip_resolved: At the start of each round, if it has less than 16 [img:shield], set [img:shield] to 16. -20% max health.

EliteBuff_Protected.name: KEYWORD_ELITE_PROTECTED_NAME
EliteBuff_Protected.tooltip_resolved: At the end of each turn, set [img:divineshield] to 1 if it had no [img:divineshield]. -20% max health.

EliteBuff_Flaming.name: KEYWORD_ELITE_FLAMING_NAME
EliteBuff_Flaming.tooltip_resolved: Fire Immune. Leaves a trail of fire.

EliteBuff_BossFlaming.name: KEYWORD_ELITE_BOSSFLAMING_NAME
EliteBuff_BossFlaming.tooltip_resolved: Fire Immune. Leaves a trail of fire. Applies Burn 1 to attackers.

EliteBuff_Creepy.name: KEYWORD_ELITE_CREEPY_NAME
EliteBuff_Creepy.tooltip_resolved: Basic attack inflicts Poison. Leaves a trail of creep.

EliteBuff_Static.name: KEYWORD_ELITE_STATIC_NAME
EliteBuff_Static.tooltip_resolved: Arcs 1 electric damage to neighbors whenever it moves.

EliteBuff_Bouncy.name: KEYWORD_ELITE_BOUNCY_NAME
EliteBuff_Bouncy.tooltip_resolved: When hit, bounces itself and its attacker apart.

EliteBuff_Mirror.name: KEYWORD_ELITE_MIRROR_NAME
EliteBuff_Mirror.tooltip_resolved: Reflects all projectiles. Takes 2 damage when it reflects a projectile.

EliteBuff_Resonant.name: KEYWORD_ELITE_RESONANT_NAME
EliteBuff_Resonant.tooltip_resolved: Whenever an enemy casts a spell, gain All Stats Up 1 and heal 1.

EliteBuff_Undying.name: KEYWORD_ELITE_UNDYING_NAME
EliteBuff_Undying.tooltip_resolved: Revives to 50% health at the end of the round. +2 Corpse Health.

EliteBuff_SubUndying.name: KEYWORD_ELITE_SUBUNDYING_NAME
EliteBuff_SubUndying.tooltip_resolved: Revives to 50% health at the end of the round.

EliteBuff_Sandy.name: KEYWORD_ELITE_SANDY_NAME
EliteBuff_Sandy.tooltip_resolved: +10% Dodge Chance. Starts a sandstorm when it dies.

EliteBuff_Infested.name: KEYWORD_ELITE_INFESTED_NAME
EliteBuff_Infested.tooltip_resolved: Spawns a fly swarm when it dies.

EliteBuff_Absorbant.name: KEYWORD_ELITE_ABSORBANT_NAME
EliteBuff_Absorbant.tooltip_resolved: Drains all unused mana from units when they end their turn, and deals damage to them equal to the amount of mana drained.

EliteBuff_Depressing.name: KEYWORD_ELITE_DEPRESSING_NAME
EliteBuff_Depressing.tooltip_resolved: While alive, its enemies have -1 to all stats.

EliteBuff_SlightlyDepressing.name: KEYWORD_ELITE_SLIGHTLYDEPRESSING_NAME
EliteBuff_SlightlyDepressing.tooltip_resolved: While alive, adjacent enemies have -1 to all stats.

EliteBuff_Evolving.name: KEYWORD_ELITE_EVOLVING_NAME
EliteBuff_Evolving.tooltip_resolved: At the end of each round, gain a random Elite Buff.

EliteBuff_Plow.name: KEYWORD_ELITE_PLOW_NAME
EliteBuff_Plow.tooltip_resolved: Trample. Moves one space towards attackers when damaged.

EliteBuff_Mega.name: KEYWORD_ELITE_MEGA_NAME
EliteBuff_Mega.tooltip_resolved: Takes one less turn per round. +50% health and damage

EliteBuff_Mad.name: KEYWORD_ELITE_MAD_NAME
EliteBuff_Mad.tooltip_resolved: Madness. Takes an extra turn per round. Gains +1 all stats and heals 4 when it gets a kill.

EliteBuff_BossMad.name: KEYWORD_ELITE_BOSSMAD_NAME
EliteBuff_BossMad.tooltip_resolved: Madness. Gains +1 all stats and heals 4 when it gets a kill.

EliteBuff_Twin.name: KEYWORD_ELITE_TWIN_NAME
EliteBuff_Twin.tooltip_resolved: Half health. Comes with a twin.

EliteBuff_Sticky.name: KEYWORD_ELITE_STICKY_NAME
EliteBuff_Sticky.tooltip_resolved: Anything that contacts or attacks this gets Tarred 1.
